name: sql_db_query (4a8415a9)
input:
{"query":"SELECT DISTINCT u.id AS user_id,
       u.username,
       u.phone,
       uc.id AS user_coupon_id,
       uc.acquired_at,
       uc.expires_at
FROM user_coupons uc
JOIN coupons c ON c.id = uc.coupon_id
JOIN users u ON u.id = uc.user_id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.user_coupon_id = uc.id
WHERE c.coupon_name = '满100减15代金券'
  AND (uc.status = 'UNUSED' OR uc.used_at IS NULL)
  AND o.id IS NULL
ORDER BY uc.acquired_at DESC
LIMIT 5;"}
